programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
The Baby Bird: Up in the tree tops, a bird mum is busy teaching her baby bird to fly.
Sand Hopper Holiday: Tiny Toot, Pixie and Gato go to the beach - it is a good day to build sand castles! Pixie uses magic to turn them small.
Who says there isn't always a Rainbow, Punky won't ever give up until her Rainbow is found.
Seesaw: Dad has rudely plonked himself on one end of the seesaw. So Bluey and Bingo round up the entire playground to help flip him off, but they still need to find one more friend.
Dylan the Airplane Pilot wants to give his passengers an amazing flight, but he doesn't know where to land!
Dylan the Dino Expert wants to discover dinosaur bones, but assembling them into a dino-shape is a lot harder than finding them!
On his royal mission, Daniel discovers that the most important part of being King is being kind to his neighbors.
Helium is on her way home and really needs to pee. But other Atoms keep taking the elevator to other floors, much to her frustration.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'a', and we go on an adventure around the sound. There's an astronaut, some adorable alpacas and an angry alligator!
The four adventure-seeking superheroes visit London on New Year's Eve, but Big Ben is missing.
Betty's ice-cream is lifting everyone off the ground, so Mojo and Bo need to get them down.
Hear me roar: Teeny Rex wants to scare everyone, but his roar only makes them laugh! Titus builds him a whistle that works a little too well.
The Magic Trick: Pigglywig doesn't want to clean up the mess around his shop, so he tries hiding everything in the box Titus made. But then Quasar threatens to take it away.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Finding Proof: The Fur Taxi team pick up a scientist from a geology conference. Since the conference is dedicated to crystals, the friends start arguing about whether floating crystals exist.
The Love Badge: Delivery Chipmunk celebrates love and burritos with a show-stopping song.
The Rollercoaster Badge: Hold on tight as the Squirrels build the best rollercoaster ever.
When Sonia and Hugo's blue towel gets stained in the wash, they realise the mix-up doesn't change its purpose, to keep playing with it! (SL)
While looking for Super Sam, Hugo and Sonia use their imagination to think about all the adventures he could be on. (SL)
DJ Ali and Juanita at the Radio Station are waiting on Joe's deliveries while time is ticking until they go on the air. (SL)
The Baby Bird: Up in the tree tops, a bird mum is busy teaching her baby bird to fly.
Sand Hopper Holiday: Tiny Toot, Pixie and Gato go to the beach - it is a good day to build sand castles! Pixie uses magic to turn them small.
Who says there isn't always a Rainbow, Punky won't ever give up until her Rainbow is found.
Fly Spy: The friends plan a secret surprise for Fly. But as Hooper and Fly find out there's a big secret, will they use their super-spy plan to discover what the surprise is?
Henry meets a tiny old tow truck at the junk yard. Truck has dreams of being in a monster truck race, but his small wheels are holding him back.
Detective: There is a phantom knitter decorating the town's buildings with super-size creations! Stanley and Fifi play detective to solve all the clues and discover who's behind it all!
Treat: It's Stanley's birthday so the town throws him a surprise party and his gift is that Jose and Peggy will take on all his jobs for the day!

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: The Big Do Over: The engines overlook construction problems, forcing them to redo Cronk's Crossing.
Mouse has found magic ink; anything she writes becomes reality. She promises Dragon she will write beautiful adventures for them together. But she mostly just thinks of herself!
Brewster, Maggie and the twins find a toy dinosaur. They wonder 'Why don't we see real dinosaurs?'
The inquisitive Brewster, six-year-old Maggie and friend Hamish meet Sunny Sun, who explains that the temperature increases whenever he is closer to the Earth.
Tá Peppa agus a cairde ag an ngrúpa spraoi. Inniu beidh Madame Gazelle agus na páistí ar fad ag tarraingt pictiúr dá dteaghlaigh.
Tugann Peppa agus George cúnamh do Grandpa Pig teachín éan a dhéanamh chun go bhfeicfidh siad ulchabhán san oíche.
Ceol Ceathrair: Castar banna buachaillí brónacha ar Bhreacaí, Ceathrar Le Chéile. Tá ceolchoirm le bheith acu gan mhoill agus níl stáitse acu! Tá réiteach na faidhbe ag Breacaí.
Níos Airde agus Níos Airde: Déanann Breacaí marcaíochtaí fiáine de na marcaíochtaí is séimhe agus is simplí.
Dreancaid Mossy: Eagraíonn Oona teacht le chéile lena cairde sa scrobarnach- ach ní théann cúrsaí go maith nuair a thugann Mossy leis aoi gan choinne - an dreancaid Fred.
Dinnéar Toigh Bernie: Tá an fhaocha gliomaigh Bernadette ag teacht ar cuairt ar Bernie. Cuidíonn Oona agus Baba leis bia a aimsiú don fhéasta, ach níl na dallóga fraoigh ag cuidiú leo.
The friends can't sleep, they keep hearing scary noises.
Grounded: Singing while flying, Nemi gets distracted and accidentally collides with his Dad. Despite the warnings, Nemi shows no signs of remorse.
Andy Day travels back in time 127 million years to the time of the Iguanodon - a plant-eating dinosaur that moved in herds - to make a plaster copy of one of its footprints.
Betty's ice-cream is lifting everyone off the ground, so Mojo and Bo need to get them down.

WAGGY TAIL: Maddie's fun and games are temporarily stopped when Triggs' incredibly waggy tail starts accidentally knocking things over - it's almost like his waggy tail has a life of its own!

programmes.show_name: Nina and the Neurons: Brilliant Bodies
programmes.show_description: Two Ears: Nina investigates why people have two ears, and Eve, Finlay and Lana help with a listening experiment.
Mission: Foldy Stick: Guide dog Kika and her owner Dr Amit are off to the Sticks 'n' Stuff shop with Amit's friend Alana, who is also blind, to help her buy a new white cane.
BaBa struggles to follow the steps in MeMo's dance routine, but this doesn't mean BaBa can't dance. With the help of friends, BaBa discovers that there are many ways to dance.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
The Spider: A spider is weaving the most beautiful spiderweb and Tiny Toot happily balances along the strings like a tightrope walker.
The Rhinoceros Beetle: The three friends meet the rhinoceros beetle who is in need of help: It is building a house, but its fringe keeps covering its eyes, so it can't see what it is doing.
Cleaning up can be fun, but not everything needs to be cleaned, Punky finds out the hard way but has fun doing it.
Movies: It's Bluey's first trip to the cinema, but she's worried the movie will be too scary. When Bingo starts running amok in the theatre, she must conquer her fear and help Dad out.
Dylan the Mail Carrier wants to deliver all the mail, but when one of the addresses becomes unreadable, he's going to have to do some extra leg work...
Dylan the Waiter wants to give his customer what they want, but when word spreads about how good he is, his restaurant staff want to be diners too!
Daniel and Prince Wednesday discover a lizard in Daniel's backyard. They have a lot of questions about the lizard. When they wonder and explore, they learn so many new things.
Gold orders a chocolate statue of herself to impress Silver at her party, but Oxygen finds it difficult transporting it in the random Atom Town weather.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'b', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We see some brilliant beards, blow some bubbles and meet a baboon bouncing balls!
Glitch goes on a desert adventure to uncover a lost city, but is disappointed to learn someone else has found it already.
A mystery is afoot! Somebody's been digging up and running off with Jackson's giant vegetables. Detectives Mojo and Bo must follow the clues to the cagey culprit.
Pirate vs Pirate: GreenBeard is feeling down when no one wants to play pirate with him. To cheer him up, Ollie and Titus set up a big treasure hunt.
Sisterly Switch day: Ollie and Bella are each convinced the other has it easy until they swap days! Soon, they discover that the other's life is anything but simple.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: The Charleston Chase: Plu gets a visit from his Grandma Stella. She's planning to take part in a Charleston competition and has invited Plu to join her.
The World Record Badge: Like Duggee, The Squirrels want to break a world record. Teamwork is the way forward.
The In Charge Badge: The Squirrels find out that being in charge is trickier than Duggee makes it look.
When Hugo can't guess Sonia's animal impression, she realises that giving more clues might help him figure it out. (SL)
As the family gets ready for Nicky's birthday party, Sonia and Hugo learn the benefits of helping each other and working as a team. (SL)
Today Joe makes deliveries to Nathan and barista John at the Café. (SL)
The Spider: A spider is weaving the most beautiful spiderweb and Tiny Toot happily balances along the strings like a tightrope walker.
The Rhinoceros Beetle: The three friends meet the rhinoceros beetle who is in need of help: It is building a house, but its fringe keeps covering its eyes, so it can't see what it is doing.
Cleaning up can be fun, but not everything needs to be cleaned, Punky finds out the hard way but has fun doing it.
Frightful Friend: Plom has a spooky sleepover for his friends.
Henry meets a giant observatory telescope. Telescope has just discovered a new constellation and spins around in excitement. The trouble is he didn't write down the co-ordinates!
Wonder Vole: Benjamin has lost his cuddly toy 'Wondervole' and can't sleep without it.
Band: The kids have written a new song and have asked Stanley to make a special video of their performance.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Did I Miss It: Thomas is eager to watch the next construction phase, but his helpfulness keeps him away.
Mouse and Dragon see a shooting star. Mouse immediately makes a wish. Dragon doesn't. The next day, Dragon is suddenly worshiped by everyone. Did she secretly make a wish?
Hamish's eyes start to water while making onion soup. He wonders 'Why do onions make our eyes water?' The friends meet Soup Dragon who explains the onion makes our eyes water.
Helvetica Frog notices a rainbow and asks, 'Why aren't raindrops different colours?' They meet Drippy who shows them that raindrops and sunlight make the rainbow colours.
Baineann teaghlach Peppa an-sult as an gcrann úll atá acu i gcaitheamh na bliana - san earrach, sa samhradh, san fhómhar agus sa ngeimhreadh.
Téann Peppa agus an teaghlach ag siúl faoin tuath agus críochnaíonn siad ar deireadh thuas ar chnoc mór. Bíonn an radharc ag an mbarr go hálainn ar fad.
Breachtairí: Tá cás á fhiosrú ag an Bhleachtaire Breacaí, an 'Breach-taire'! Tá duine éigin ag goid bia ó dhaoine eile agus is faoi Bhreacaí agus a cara Peann Luaidhe atá an gadaí a aimsiú!
Crosfhocail Chrosta: Nuair a théann Breacaí ar strae san Ollchathair Ollghnóthach, caithfidh sí dul in iomaíocht le Máistir na gCrosfhocal agus a thomhaiseanna a fhuascailt in am don lón.
An Priompallán: Feiceann Oona agus Baba priompallán ag brú carn caca ar ais chuig a nead. Is féidir leo leas a bhaint as scileanna tochailte Oona in am na cinniúna.
Turas Iascaireachta Oona: Tá Oona ag iascaireacht le Daidí inniu den chéad uair, ach níl an iascaireacht furasta ar lá gaofar agus faoileáin ocracha ar an Chreag.
Legend says that most pirates are men, not the case! Simon is writing a song about a pirate called Sylvia, she rocks!!
Snowy Night: As Reggie and Maya walk back to the cave, snow begins to fall. While Maya hurries back to the cave - Reggie stops to enjoy the snow.
Andy Day travels back 220 million years to the time of the coelophysis - one of the earliest dinosaurs that hunted in packs and was an expert at fishing.
A mystery is afoot! Somebody's been digging up and running off with Jackson's giant vegetables. Detectives Mojo and Bo must follow the clues to the cagey culprit.
